beats.label: hero
beats.text: Tell us what you need. We'll tell you who to meet. The four people at Proof of Talk who'll change your year.

beats.label: set_password
beats.text: Your ticket already gives you a profile. Just set a password to claim it — and unlock messaging.

beats.label: profile
beats.text: Sharpen your write-up. Tap Regenerate with AI, and the matches sharpen with it.

beats.label: matches
beats.text: Your top introductions land here — ranked, with exactly why each meeting matters.

beats.label: messages
beats.text: Tap I'd like to meet. When they accept back, your messages unlock.

beats.label: mutual_book
beats.text: Mutual match — and you're both free. Book a slot in one tap.

beats.label: threads
beats.text: Or jump into a sector thread now — start the conversation before Paris.

beats.label: cta
beats.text: Proof of Talk Matchmaker. Find the people who'll change your year.
